name: Simi Fehoko
headline: Blocking Specialist With No Path To Targets
body:
Fehoko's 2024 profile screams deep-roster afterthought: 16 targets across six games for a 3.3% target share, a 0.132 rate per route run, and just six catches on 37.5% efficiency. The 106 yards came on a vertical diet, 14.75 air yards per look, yet only 0.88 yards per route run and a WOPR under 0.09 confirm he never commanded volume. A 0.168 EPA per play and 37.5% success rate read fine in a tiny sample, but two of his eight catchable balls hit the ground.

Now in Arizona on a one-year deal, the 6-foot-4 Stanford product profiles as a blocker and special-teams body rather than a rotational pass-catcher. He logged zero scores in 2024 after his lone 2023 receiving touchdown, and carries no meaningful ADP or ranking. Until injuries clear a path, treat him as roster filler with negligible fantasy upside in any format.
